'''madate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:abashlessly|abashlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:abashlessly|abashlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| madate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:madate|madate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:madatesher|madatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madatesherĂ«m|madatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:madatero|madatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:madateshĂ«|madateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madateshĂ«m|madateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimadatero|gokimadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimadateshĂ«|gokimadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadateshĂ«m|gokimadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomadankerom|gomadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomadankeshĂ«|gomadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadankeshĂ«m|gomadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomadankeya|gomadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:madaterom|madaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madatemu|madatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:madateya|madateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimadaterom|gokimadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadatemu|gokimadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimadateya|gokimadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:madadate|madadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:madadatesher|madadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madadatesherĂ«m|madadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:madadatero|madadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:madadateshĂ«|madadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madadateshĂ«m|madadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimadadatero|gokimadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimadadateshĂ«|gokimadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadadateshĂ«m|gokimadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomadadankerom|gomadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomadadankeshĂ«|gomadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomadadankeshĂ«m|gomadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomadadankeya|gomadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:madadaterom|madadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:madadatemu|madadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:madadateya|madadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimadadaterom|gokimadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimadadatemu|gokimadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimadadateya|gokimadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠte|mĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠtesher|mĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠtero|mĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠdĂŠtero|gokimĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠterom|mĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠtemu|mĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠdĂŠteya|mĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠdĂŠterom|gokimĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠdĂŠteya|gokimĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafdafte|mafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafdaftesher|mafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafdaftesherĂ«m|mafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafdaftero|mafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafdafteshĂ«|mafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafdafteshĂ«m|mafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafdaftero|gokimafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafdafteshĂ«|gokimafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafdafteshĂ«m|gokimafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafdafnkerom|gomafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafdafnkeshĂ«|gomafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafdafnkeshĂ«m|gomafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafdafnkeya|gomafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafdafterom|mafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafdaftemu|mafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafdafteya|mafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafdafterom|gokimafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafdaftemu|gokimafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafdafteya|gokimafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
